immediate_actions: Enable SSH rate limiting on prod-db-01
Check for any successful logins from this subnet
containment_steps: Review prod-db-01 auth logs for last 24h
Rotate SSH credentials if any exposure found
ALERT-001.summary: High-volume SSH brute force from threat-intel-flagged IP targeting production database server

containment_steps: Scan for lateral movement from DESKTOP-HR-042
Check email gateway for source phishing email
ALERT-002.summary: Macro-triggered PowerShell downloading external payload from HR workstation -- active malware execution

immediate_actions: Review CloudTrail for what secrets were accessed
Check if secrets have been rotated recently
containment_steps: Review Lambda code for injected payload
ALERT-003.false_positive_reason: Could be a legitimate batch job or scheduled task not in baseline -- but 78x over baseline warrants investigation
ALERT-003.summary: AWS Lambda function accessing secrets 78x above baseline with no code changes -- likely compromised function or supply chain attack

immediate_actions: Identify and contact contractor assigned to 10.0.5.22
Block scan traffic if not authorized
containment_steps: Check if contractor account is still active/needed
ALERT-004.false_positive_reason: Could be authorized pen test or contractor running a legitimate network audit tool -- needs verification
ALERT-004.summary: Contractor workstation conducting internal port scan of server subnet targeting common service ports

immediate_actions: Send security awareness notification to Finance team
Add domains to threat intel blocklist

Send targeted awareness email to 3 users who clicked
ALERT-005.summary: PayPal typosquat phishing email targeting Finance team successfully blocked by gateway -- no delivery
